data.current_description: Registers a new guest or confirms an existing guest through a public form submission.
data.summary_suggestion: Register or confirm guest via public form
data.description_suggestion: Registers a new guest or confirms an existing guest's attendance through a public form submission. Accepts guest information (name, email, etc.) and creates or updates the guest record accordingly. Returns the registered or confirmed guest object with assigned ID and status. This operation is publicly accessible and does not require authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on inputs (what guest information is required), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (whether this creates new records or updates existing ones). data.current_description: Retrieves accessible events with optional time-based filtering.
